name: whereECH
description: Privacy-respecting indicator showing whether the current site advertises Encrypted Client Hello (ECH) via its DNS HTTPS record.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src https:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
